name: Alfonso Cannavale
researchTrack: PhD in Computer Science (Internet of Things and Smart Technologies)
bio: I am a PhD student at SeSaLab, University of Salerno. My early research explored quality assurance challenges in ML and AI systems, with a strong focus on testing strategies and reliability. I am currently concentrating on Agentic AI, investigating methods, tools, and empirical evidence to engineer dependable AI agents in real-world software ecosystems.
researchInterests: Testing and quality assurance for AI/ML systems
Empirical software engineering for intelligent systems
Software evolution and maintainability in AI-enabled applications
